channel.title: Posts on Mostafa Khalil
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Mostafa Khalil

item.title: Accidental Complexity
item.description:
A Quick Change

“This should be a quick change” - Said the engineer who ended up taking two weeks making the quick change.

It is not uncommon for a seemingly benign change - one for which there is a general consensus that it is very easy; maybe too easy to even receive a concrete estimate - to end up taking longer than expected.

A single delay can cascade in an entire workstream. Teams have been getting better at dealing with this type of delays though: engineers know how to raise their hand early, and short iterative sprints catch incomplete work.
